hero.subtitle_ours: The Past is behind and the

programs_page.title: Our Programs
description: At Anoon LLC, we believe there is no shame in falling.
only in staying down. We help people rise by giving them the skills to build again.
We don't just offer a second chance, we offer the tools to create a new life.

cards.description: We Believe That Knowledge can't be taken away and student is the future. With Our Work & our partner We make a change and still do.
Knowledge is the only thing that they can't take away from us. We can be destroyed but our mind will shape the future, our thoughts fly high without a limit.

success_stories.title: Success Stories
description: Because it's important to celebrate our student & freelancer who have suffered
but kept going and surpass their limit and kept moving toward the light

alla.name: Alla Abu Hamaza
alla.quote: Thank You Tamkeen I didn't just make money i was able to achieve my dreams, i know that i have the skill but you give me the tools and platform and the network i need it was a lovely journey, yes it was tough but we made it through together

yazan.name: Yazan Deher
yazan.quote: I Believe That i was my destiny, i am amazing UX Designer yet i learned a lot of empathy from the staff i needed a place to feel where i belong and i found it here, Now i am in a better place, happy where i am and still rising and i will never give up

impact_page.description: We didn't wait for permission. While the world watched in silence, we chose to build. Alongside those who truly stood by us, we carved a path through the impossible. We didn't just bring frameworks; we brought the tools for our people to reclaim their own future. We are still here, we are still building, and our will is stronger than any struggle.
impact_page.additional_text: We Are Going To Be The Different

tamkeen_impact.description: Fly So High , We Reach The Sky and now its time to go beyond We are , we help , we care and we are proud of that.

noon_hub_impact.description: Noon Hub provides a safe and collaborative space for freelancers and students to network, learn, and grow together, creating a vibrant tech community in Gaza.

tech_training_impact.description: Our technical training programs have equipped over 500 students with in-demand skills in web development, UI/UX design, and AI, with an 85% success rate in freelancing.

space_noon_impact.description: Space Noon offers modern co-working facilities with reliable electricity, high-speed internet, and networking events, creating the perfect environment for productivity.

who_we_are_page.subtitle: Who We Are
who_we_are_page.description: Anoon LLC doesn't just build software. When the world went dark, we stayed. We met our mission head-on in Gaza by offering a future. We equipped students with the technical mastery to rise, because they can take everything else, but they can't take what you know.
who_we_are_page.feature1_desc: We deliver scalable, secure & impact-oriented digital systems specializing in AI Agent
who_we_are_page.feature2_desc: Our Programs Provides the infrastructure and skills freelancers need to remain economically active.

questions.q: Is Anoon a charity or a company?
questions.a: Anoon is a social enterprise, not a charity. We combine education and technical solutions for sustainable impact.

questions.q: Do you work with international partners?
questions.a: Yes, we collaborate with international organizations to expand our reach and impact.

We Don't Offer just desks, we offer a "rehabilitation" approach providing the routine, peer support, and stability needed to work professionally in a conflict zone. After all that we provide freelancing training so it could compete in the Modern day world.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get weekly updates on the newest design stories, case studies and tips right in your mailbox.
newsletter.footer: Your email is safe with us, we don't spam.

hero.subtitle: Buildings can be broken, but the human Spirit remain Ignited. We didn't wait, We just did it because while aid sustains the body, knowledge reclaims the future. The war took Everything, but couldn't take our skills. We are building the minds that will rebuild this land.

who_we_are.subtitle: Who We Are
who_we_are.description: Tamkeen is dedicated to providing clarity and hope. We strive to help every student recognize their worth, go beyond their limits and become the best version of themselves for the sake of a better future by providing work space that is modern, high quality and saves their time & money.

info.description: Your Network is everything, no matter how Professional you are if you don't have the right people it doesn't matter, with us we give you the network of your dream

intelligent_solution.title: Complex Problem Requires
intelligent_solution.description: As technology advances, workloads are increasing and manual processes are no longer efficient. Integrating AI agents into the workplace is the most effective way to save time, reduce costs, and improve productivity.

learn_more.description: Want to understand how AI is shaping the future of business? Our AI Development Blog breaks down the latest trends, tools, and real-world strategies behind building powerful AI systems and intelligent agents. Whether you're a founder, developer, or tech enthusiast, discover practical insights that help you stay ahead in the AI revolution. Read, learn, and build smarter with AI.

our_services.subtitle: AI Agents Development
our_services.description: As business complexity grows, developing AI agents has become essential for building scalable and efficient operations. Investing in AI agent development enables organizations to automate tasks, optimize decision-making, and create sustainable competitive advantages.
